message:
feat: centralize error handling in dolt storage layer (bd-bwk2)

Create internal/storage/dolt/errors.go with:
- Sentinel errors: ErrTransaction, ErrQuery, ErrScan, ErrExec
- Helper functions: wrapDBError, wrapTransactionError, wrapScanError,
  wrapQueryError, wrapExecError
- wrapDBError converts sql.ErrNoRows to storage.ErrNotFound

Apply centralized wrapping to bare `return err` patterns in:
- transaction.go: All CRUD operations now wrap with operation context
- queries.go: computeBlockedIDs, GetEpicsEligibleForClosure,
  getChildrenOfIssues, GetMoleculeProgress, GetNextChildID
- dependencies.go: GetBlockingInfoForIssues, IsBlocked,
  GetNewlyUnblockedByClose, scanIssueIDs, getIssuesByIDsDolt

This enables errors.Is() checks against sentinel types and provides
consistent operation context for debugging production issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/opal
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
